title: Windbag the Sailor
writer: Robert Stevenson, Leslie Arliss, Marriott Edgar
actors: Will Hay, Moore Marriott, Graham Moffatt
plot: A bragging sea captain's maritime experience actually extends to navigating a coal barge down inland waterways. His tall tales catch him out when he is coerced into commanding an unseaworthy ship by an unscrupulous shipping agent ...
